queries.question: Show me public relations positions with any contact and the government communications positions but only in contact with "Fox News".
queries.sql:
SELECT Public_Relations.role
FROM Contacts JOIN Public_Relations ON Contacts.public_relations_id = Public_Relations.id
UNION
SELECT Government_Communications.role
FROM Contacts JOIN Government_Communications ON Contacts.government_communications_id = Government_Communications.id
WHERE Contacts.organization = "Fox News"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?contacts a :Contacts .
    ?public_relations a :Public_Relations .
    ?contacts p:hasPublic_Relations ?public_relations .
    ?public_relations p:role ?role .
    BIND(?role AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?contacts a :Contacts .
    ?government_communications a :Government_Communications .
    ?contacts p:hasGovernment_Communications ?government_communications .
    ?government_communications p:role ?role .
    ?contacts p:organization ?organization_f .
    FILTER(STR(?organization_f) = "Fox News")
    BIND(?role AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: Display public relations positions and government communication positions that are in contact with "Fox News".
queries.sql:
SELECT Public_Relations.role
FROM Contacts JOIN Public_Relations ON Contacts.public_relations_id = Public_Relations.id
WHERE Contacts.organization = "Fox News"
UNION
SELECT Government_Communications.role
FROM Contacts JOIN Government_Communications ON Contacts.government_communications_id = Government_Communications.id
WHERE Contacts.organization = "Fox News"
queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?contacts a :Contacts .
    ?public_relations a :Public_Relations .
    ?contacts p:hasPublic_Relations ?public_relations .
    ?public_relations p:role ?role .
    ?contacts p:organization ?organization_f .
    FILTER(STR(?organization_f) = "Fox News")
    BIND(?role AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?contacts a :Contacts .
    ?government_communications a :Government_Communications .
    ?contacts p:hasGovernment_Communications ?government_communications .
    ?government_communications p:role ?role .
    ?contacts p:organization ?organization_f .

}
